title: LLMs & RAG Quiz
description: Test your LLM, prompt engineering, and RAG knowledge.

questions.question: What problem does RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) solve?

options.text: It makes LLMs generate faster responses
It gives LLMs access to up-to-date or private knowledge by retrieving relevant documents at query time
It trains LLMs on new tasks without full fine-tuning
It reduces the cost of LLM API calls

questions.question: What does 'temperature' control in an LLM API call?

options.text: The randomness/creativity of outputs — lower = more deterministic, higher = more creative
The number of output tokens generated
The size of the model's context window
Fine-tuning the LLM on a small dataset
Providing example input-output pairs in the prompt to guide the model's response format and behaviour
Limiting the model to short responses
Running multiple prompts and selecting the best result
